title: Bean's Enchants
description: Multiple balanced enchantments that help with different activities, as well as a few new curses...
body:
![Bean's Enchants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50307dfd7a5e969632a1675c8775d72795dcf8ae.png)
![Heaps of hits!](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/beans-enchants)

Report any bugs in the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/jmVGMvtrcd)!

# Enchantments
### Bane of Ender
- Enchantable on any weapon
- Can only be found in an Enchanting Table when enchanting a melee weapon
- Can be found in Villager trades and as treasure
- Hurts all ender mobs more
- Mutually exclusive with Curse of Balancing, Sharpness, Bane of Arthropods, and Smite
### Venom
- Enchantable on any sharp weapon
- Can only be found in an Enchanting Table when enchanting a sword
- Inflicts Poison on the victim
### Pincing
- Enchantable on any tool/weapon
- Can only be found in an Enchanting Table when enchanting a mining tool
- Extends player reach while using the enchanted item
### Reaping
- Enchantable on any bow
- Can be found in Villager trades and as treasure
- Heals the player every time they damage a victim
- Mutually exclusive with Multishot and Piercing
### Curse of Midas
- Enchantable on any mining tool
- Can be found in Villager trades and as treasure
- Every time the player attempts to mine a block there is a 12% chance the block turns into a Block of Raw Gold
- Creates yellow particles
- Mutually exclusive with Silk Touch and Fortune
### Curse of Balancing
- Enchantable on any sharp weapon
- Can be found in Villager trades and as treasure
- Applies damage to the player when they attack a mob
- Mutually exclusive with Bane of Ender, Sharpness, Bane of Arthropods, and Smite
